ec2.localgatewayroute.CfnAbout:
Creates a static route for the specified local gateway route table. You must specify one of the following targets: 
+  `LocalGatewayVirtualInterfaceGroupId` 
+  `NetworkInterfaceId`

ec2.localgatewayroute.DestinationCidrBlo.Description: The CIDR block used for destination matches.

ec2.localgatewayroute.LocalGatewayRouteT.Description: The ID of the local gateway route table.

ec2.localgatewayroute.LocalGatewayVirtua.Description: The ID of the virtual interface group.

ec2.localgatewayroute.NetworkInterfaceId.Description: The ID of the network interface.
